mapper.select: SELECT f.*, a.title AS areaName, CONCAT(actor.id, ':', actor.actor) as actorInfo, -- 子查询获取当前影院的场次数量 (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cinema_film cf WHERE cf.film_id = f.id AND cf.cinema_id = #{cinemaId}) AS showCount FROM film f LEFT JOIN area a ON f.area_id = a.id LEFT JOIN actor ON f.actor_id = actor.id INNER JOIN cinema_film cf ON f.id = cf.film_id WHERE cf.cinema_id = #{cinemaId} AND f.id = #{filmId} ORDER BY f.id DESC

SELECT film.*, area.title as areaName, CONCAT(actor.id, ':', actor.actor) as actorInfo FROM film LEFT JOIN area ON film.area_id = area.id LEFT JOIN actor ON film.actor_id = actor.id WHERE film.id = #{id}
SELECT * FROM film WHERE title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%')

SELECT film.*, area.title as areaName, CONCAT(actor.id, ':', actor.actor) as actorInfo FROM film LEFT JOIN area ON film.area_id = area.id LEFT JOIN actor ON film.actor_id = actor.id ORDER BY film.boxOffice DESC LIMIT #{topNum}

SELECT film.*, area.title as areaName, CONCAT(actor.id, ':', actor.actor) as actorInfo FROM film LEFT JOIN area ON film.area_id = area.id LEFT JOIN actor ON film.actor_id = actor.id WHERE film.score IS NOT NULL ORDER BY film.score DESC LIMIT #{topNum}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO film
title, content, time, english, start, type_ids, language, resolution, img, employee, area_id, status, score, boxOffice, video,
VALUES
#{title}, #{content}, #{time}, #{english}, #{start}, #{typeIds}, #{language}, #{resolution}, #{img}, #{employee}, #{areaId}, #{status}, #{score}, #{boxOffice}, #{video},
